memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-22 — Memorial Day binary event trap + AVGO divergence + 4 routine failures

**3 things that worked:**
1. Memorial Day binary event trap correctly identified — MRVL earnings May 27; May 25 is holiday; any May 22 entry carries to May 26 (within 48h window). Exemption 2 properly invoked.
2. AVGO bearish divergence rejection correct — AVGO down ~3-4% on S&P +0.55% day = institutional selling signal. Score 6.0 rejected. Did not chase falling name.
3. Market Open AND Mid-Morning both completed — two consecutive routines for first time in days.

**3 to improve:**
1. Pre-Market must fire May 26 — critical to verify GTC order status before new MOO placement.
2. Market Close scheduler must be fixed — 8th+ consecutive failure, no EOD stop audit since May 13.
3. AMD/PLTR/MU must fill May 26 — 10+ consecutive blocked sessions. Operator manual execution required.

### 2026-05-20 — NVDA sell-the-news + AMD 6th miss + oil collapse

**3 things that worked:**
1. GLD hedge +1.25% on risk-on day + oil collapse — cross-asset protection confirmed
2. Binary event exclusion correctly applied — no new NVDA entries made (AH -2.44% validates rule)
3. NVDA beat confirms AI infrastructure thesis — AMD, MU, AVGO all read-through beneficiaries

**3 to improve:**
1. AMD MUST be entered at Market Open May 21 — 6th consecutive failure is unacceptable
2. PLTR conditional entry is NOW triggered ($135 > $134) — MOO May 21 MANDATORY
3. NVDA earnings date was miscalculated (May 20 not May 21) — always verify from primary IR source

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- April PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. S&P rose +0.69% anyway.
- PLTR -4.31% ($136→$129.99). $134 support broken. Re-scored 6.50 (Technical 3). SKIP until $134 reclaim.
- AMD pullback from $477 to $448 normalizes RSI to ~60. Re-score 7.33. MUST ENTER.
- 7th consecutive API-blocked routine. AMD MOC attempted 19:42:21Z — HTTP 403.

market.macro_notes_md:
**2026-05-22 EOD macro:**
- **Kevin Warsh (new Fed Chair, sworn in today):** Hawkish. Markets pricing 20-30% probability of rate hike by Dec 2026. Higher-for-longer = headwind for high-multiple semis (AVGO, MRVL). Gold bid on rate uncertainty.
- **Iran war talks progress:** Geopolitical de-escalation = risk-on. Equities up despite oil +1.8% (market reading de-escalation as dominant factor).
- **AMD $10B Taiwan AI investment:** Announced May 21 — TSM CoWoS partnerships, AI chip ramp. Strengthens AI accelerator thesis. AMD ~+0.3% today from May 21 close.
- **MRVL:** Multiple analyst upgrades (Citi PT $215, Oppenheimer, Wells Fargo, Melius). New 52-week high. INELIGIBLE until post-May 27 earnings.
- **Memorial Day (May 25) implications:** Next trading day = May 26. GTC orders placed May 22 eligible on May 26. No routines fire May 25.
